_comment: Budget raised 6144->6656 (6 KiB -> 6.5 KiB). The easy win was already banked by sourcing the plugin version from version.ts instead of importing the whole package.json (esbuild inlines a default JSON import wholesale, ~2.9 kB raw). The residual is legitimate code: every bundled module (registry, resolver, validate-upload-result, studio-asset-source, adapters) maps to a public export. 6656 leaves modest headroom while still catching order-of-magnitude regressions.
